pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage highlighting car audio products, key categories, and entry points to shopping flows.
primary_functions: Let users navigate quickly to main car audio categories such as stereos, speakers, subwoofers, amplifiers, bundles, and installation accessories
Provide a prominent search bar for keyword-based product discovery
Provide access to the Shop by Vehicle tool for vehicle-specific fitment shopping
Surface featured deals, bestsellers, and premium product highlights

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Car Audio" department tile or header link
Click the "Car Stereos & Receivers" tile
Click the "Speakers" tile
Click the "Subwoofers" tile
Click the "Amplifiers" tile
Click the "Packages & Bundles" tile
Click the "Installation Accessories" tile
Click the "Shop by Vehicle" call-to-action
Click a featured product card (image or title)
Submit the global search form in the header

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Home" header link
Users can load the homepage directly at index.html

pages.name: Category Listing
pages.description: Reusable product listing page for any category or subcategory (e.g., Car Stereos & Receivers, Speakers, Subwoofers, Amplifiers, Packages, Installation Accessories).
primary_functions: Display a list/grid of products for the selected categoryId with pagination

Provide filters such as price range, customer rating, features (Apple CarPlay, Bluetooth, backup camera input, free shipping, wiring kit included), size/DIN, type, RMS power, channels, and shipping options
Allow users to sort results (Price: Low to High, Price: High to Low, Most Reviewed, Top Rated, etc.)
Support comparison selection via checkboxes to send selected items to the comparison page
Provide breadcrumbs back to higher-level categories (e.g., Home > Car Audio > Speakers)
Allow navigation to product detail pages by clicking product images or titles

incoming_params.description: Category.code identifying which category to list (e.g., 'car_stereos_receivers', 'speakers')
Optional minimum price filter value
Optional maximum price filter value
Optional minimum average customer rating (e.g., 4 or 4.5)
Filter flag indicating Apple CarPlay should be included
Filter flag indicating Bluetooth should be included
Filter flag indicating backup camera input should be included
Filter flag indicating only free-shipping-eligible products should be shown
Filter flag indicating only products that include a wiring kit should be shown
DIN size filter for stereos, e.g., 'single_din' or 'double_din'
Speaker or subwoofer size filter in inches, e.g., 6.5
Speaker type filter, e.g., 'component' or 'coaxial'
Optional minimum RMS power filter for speakers and amplifiers
Amplifier channel count filter (e.g., 4 for 4-channel amps)
Installation accessory subtype filter, e.g., 'amp_wiring_kit', 'dash_kit', 'antenna_adapter'
Bundle type filter, e.g., 'subwoofer_amplifier_bundle'
Fitment scope, e.g., 'selected_vehicle' to only show exact-fit products for the current vehicle
Sort mode such as 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'most_reviewed', 'top_rated'
Results page number for pagination

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product image or title in the listing
Click a breadcrumb or subcategory link within the category hierarchy
Select two or more items via comparison checkboxes and click the "Compare" button
Click the cart icon in the header from this page

access_methods.description: Accessible via multiple header links (Car Audio, Car Stereos & Receivers, Speakers, Subwoofers, Amplifiers, Packages & Bundles, Installation Accessories) with appropriate categoryId parameters
Accessed when following internal links with categoryId and optional filter/sort query parameters
Can be bookmarked or shared with full filter/sort query string preserved

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a single product including specifications, reviews, warranty options, and purchase actions.
primary_functions: Show complete product information including price, specs (DIN size, RMS power, channels, features), compatibility notes, and customer rating
Allow users to set quantity and add the product to the cart
Allow users to add the product to their wishlist or save for later
Offer selectable protection plans or warranties (e.g., 3-year protection plan) when available
Provide fitment information and links back via breadcrumbs to the relevant category or vehicle-specific listing
Show related products and bundles for system-building (e.g., matching speakers or subwoofers)

incoming_params.description: Product.id for the item whose details should be displayed
Optional referrer context such as 'category', 'search', or 'vehicle_fitment' used for back-link behavior

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Cart" or the cart icon after adding a product to the cart
Click "View Wishlist" after adding a product to the wishlist
Click a category in the breadcrumb trail (e.g., 'Car Audio', 'Speakers')
Click a related product or related bundle card

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a product ID query parameter (product.html?id=123)
Product detail URLs can be shared or bookmarked

pages.name: Search Results
pages.description: Listing page for keyword search queries initiated from the site-wide search bar.
primary_functions: Display products matching a user’s search query (e.g., 'car amplifier 4 channel')
Provide filters such as RMS power, channels, price range, customer rating, features, and shipping options similar to category listings
Allow sorting by relevance, price, and review metrics including 'Most Reviewed'
Support comparison selection checkboxes and navigation to the product comparison page
Allow navigation to individual product detail pages

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user (e.g., 'car amplifier 4 channel')
Optional minimum price filter
Optional maximum price filter
Optional minimum rating filter
Filter flag for Apple CarPlay-capable products
Filter flag for Bluetooth-capable products
Filter flag for products with backup camera input
Filter flag for free-shipping-eligible products
Filter flag for products that include a wiring kit
Optional minimum RMS power filter, used heavily in amplifier searches
Amplifier channel count filter, e.g., 4 for 4-channel
Optional fitment scope, e.g., 'selected_vehicle' to restrict results to the current vehicle
Sorting mode, such as 'relevance', 'price_asc', 'price_desc', 'most_reviewed'
Results page number

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product image or title in search results
Select multiple products via comparison checkboxes and click the "Compare" button

access_methods.description: Accessed after submitting the global search form on any page
Search results can be accessed directly with a q parameter and optional filter/sort parameters

pages.name: Product Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of two or more products to support spec-based decision making.
primary_functions: Display selected products side by side with key specs (e.g., RMS power, size, type, features, price, rating)
Highlight differences between products (e.g., which has higher RMS power)
Allow users to click on a product name or image to open its product detail page
Provide an option to remove or replace items in the comparison

incoming_params.description: CompareSession.id used to load the products and specs being compared

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product name or image in the comparison table

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a compareSessionId query parameter
A comparison can be bookmarked or shared with its compareSessionId

pages.name: Cart
pages.description: Shopping cart summary where users can review and update items before checkout.
primary_functions: Show all items currently in the cart with product names, quantities, prices, and subtotals
Allow users to change quantities or remove items from the cart
Display order subtotal, estimated shipping (if applicable), and total cost
Provide a clear call to action to proceed to checkout
Allow users to navigate back to shopping (e.g., back to last category) if they wish to add more items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Proceed to Checkout" button
Click a product name or image in the cart item list
Click a "Continue Shopping" link that routes back to the Car Audio department

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Cart" link/icon in the header
Cart can be accessed directly at cart.html

pages.name: Checkout
pages.description: Single-page checkout flow for entering contact details, selecting shipping, and confirming purchase.
primary_functions: Collect contact information including email and full name
Provide shipping options including Standard Shipping and display associated costs and delivery estimates
Show an order summary with line items, quantities, prices, and totals for review
Allow users to confirm and place the order (payment handling abstracted for this architecture)
Allow users to return to the cart if they need to make changes before completing the order

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Cart" link from the checkout page
Optionally redirect to the homepage after a successful checkout completion

access_methods.description: Typically entered from the cart page by clicking "Proceed to Checkout" which initializes a checkout session
If a checkout session already exists, users may return directly to checkout.html

pages.name: Vehicle Selector
pages.description: Shop by Vehicle entry page where users choose their vehicle to find compatible products.
primary_functions: Allow users to select Year, Make, Model, and Body Style from dropdowns (e.g., 2018 Honda Civic Sedan)
Validate vehicle selection and submit to show all compatible products for that vehicle
Provide quick links to common categories for the selected vehicle (e.g., stereos, speakers, installation accessories)
Explain the benefits of vehicle-specific shopping and fitment guarantees

incoming_params.description: Optional URL to redirect to after vehicle selection, defaults to vehicle_results.html

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit a valid Year/Make/Model/Body Style combination via the "Find products for this vehicle" button

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Shop by Vehicle" header link
Can be loaded directly at vehicle_selector.html

pages.name: Vehicle Fitment Results
pages.description: Results hub after vehicle selection, showing categories and featured products compatible with the chosen vehicle.
primary_functions: Display the selected vehicle summary (year, make, model, body style) and allow changing the vehicle
List compatible product categories such as 'Car Stereos & Receivers that fit your vehicle', 'Speakers that fit your vehicle', etc.
Link into filtered category listings (category.html with vehicle-specific parameters) for selected categories
Highlight curated or recommended fits such as popular head units or installation kits for the vehicle

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Change Vehicle" link
Click a fitment category link such as "Car Stereos & Receivers that fit your vehicle"
Click a recommended product card on the vehicle results page

access_methods.description: Accessed immediately after submitting the vehicle selection form on vehicle_selector.html
Can be revisited directly; relies on getSelectedVehicle to load the current vehicle context

pages.name: Wishlist
pages.description: Page where users can view and manage products they have saved for later.
primary_functions: Display all products that the user added to their wishlist or saved for later
Allow users to move items from wishlist to cart
Allow users to remove items from the wishlist
Provide quick navigation to product detail pages for more information on saved items

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a product name or image in the wishlist
Click a "View Cart" button after moving items from wishlist to cart

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Wishlist" header link
Wishlist can be accessed directly at wishlist.html

pages.name: About
pages.description: Information about the store, its mission, and expertise in car audio.
primary_functions: Explain the brand story, car audio specialization, and value proposition
Build trust by describing experience, partnerships, and customer focus
Provide links back to key shopping areas for users who are ready to browse

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Shop Car Audio" or similar call-to-action within the About content

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "About" footer link
Can be loaded directly at about.html

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact information and form for customer inquiries and support.
primary_functions: Provide store contact details such as email address, phone number, and mailing address
Offer a simple contact form for questions about orders, products, or installation
Link to Help/FAQ content for self-service answers

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link suggesting users visit Help / FAQ for common questions

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Contact" footer link
Contact page can be loaded directly at contact.html

pages.name: Shipping & Returns
pages.description: Policy page detailing shipping options, free shipping terms, and return procedures.
primary_functions: Explain shipping methods including Standard Shipping, any expedited options, and free shipping eligibility
Clarify processing times, delivery estimates, and restrictions
Outline return and exchange policies, including time frames and conditions

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a link directing users to see live shipping costs during checkout

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Shipping & Returns" footer link
Can be loaded directly at shipping_returns.html

pages.name: Privacy & Terms
pages.description: Combined privacy policy and terms of use for the website.
primary_functions: Describe how user data is collected, stored, and used
Detail terms and conditions for using the website and purchasing products
Provide legal and compliance information for customers

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Privacy & Terms" footer link
Can be loaded directly at privacy_terms.html

pages.name: Help / FAQ
pages.description: Frequently asked questions and help topics about products, ordering, and installation.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about car audio product selection, compatibility, and installation basics
Provide guidance on using key site features such as Shop by Vehicle, filters, comparison, and checkout
Link to contact options for users who need additional assistance

incoming_params.description: Optional filter specifying which FAQ category to expand by default, e.g., 'vehicle_fitment' or 'checkout'

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a help link about using the Shop by Vehicle feature
Click a help link related to checkout and payment questions
Click a suggestion to contact support when FAQs do not resolve the issue

access_methods.description: Accessible via the "Help / FAQ" footer link
Help / FAQ page can be loaded directly at help.html

header_links.description: Homepage with featured car audio products and categories
Car audio department landing page with all subcategories
Category listing of car stereos and receivers, including Apple CarPlay and Bluetooth units
Category listing of car speakers including component and coaxial sets
Category listing of car subwoofers for enhanced bass
Category listing of car amplifiers including 4-channel and mono blocks
Category listing of subwoofer and amplifier bundles and system packages
Category listing of installation accessories such as wiring kits, dash kits, and antenna adapters
Select your vehicle to find stereos and accessories that fit
View and manage items in your shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn more about our car audio store and mission
Get in touch with customer support
See shipping methods, free shipping terms, and return policies
Read our privacy policy and terms of use
Find answers to common questions and get help using the site
